title: Mandala's GUI - Add-Ons
description: Resource Pack for All Mandala's GUI Texture Pack
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/ccRjlaX.png)


# ABOUT:

Here you will find all the "Texture Add-ons" of Mandala's GUI.

Some "Texture Add-Ons" are separate from this project [such as: Brewing Guide On].
Place the Texture Add-Ons on top of the Vanilla Texture.


# FEATURES:

* Mod Support [by creator and community].
* All mods have their "Dark and White mode" version.
* All compatibilities are supported for both versions of Mandalas Gui [Dark and White mode].

If you want to be a contributor, send a message through Discord, I will explain the requirement in detail.
All Contributors with a Curse Forge account can receive an equivalent reward for their work. ❤

# Compatible mods:

JEI 1.19.2 to 1.21.5
+ JADE 1.19.2 to 1.21.5
